SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.title: Flow
SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.description: Combat momentum. Some cards gain or spend Flow; while you have 3 or more, you are In the Flow.
SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.smartDescription: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} combat momentum. Some cards gain or spend Flow. At [blue]3[/blue] or more, {OnPlayer:you are|they are} [gold]In the Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.title: The Weight
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.description: Lose HP at the start of your next turn.
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.smartDescription: At the start of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next turn, {OnPlayer:you lose|they lose} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
SPACECOWBOY-TANK_POWER.title: Tank!
SPACECOWBOY-TANK_POWER.description: Gain Flow at the start of your turn.
SPACECOWBOY-TANK_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn, {OnPlayer:you gain|they gain} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_LION_POWER.title: Space Lion
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_LION_POWER.description: Gain Strength whenever you lose HP.
SPACECOWBOY-SPACE_LION_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever {OnPlayer:you lose|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses} HP, {OnPlayer:you gain|they gain} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-JUPITER_JAZZ_POWER.title: Jupiter Jazz
SPACECOWBOY-JUPITER_JAZZ_POWER.descripti: Gain Strength at the end of your turn while In the Flow.
SPACECOWBOY-JUPITER_JAZZ_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn, if [gold]In the Flow[/gold], {OnPlayer:you gain|they gain} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-BLUE_POWER.title: Blue
SPACECOWBOY-BLUE_POWER.description: Gain Flow whenever you play a card.
SPACECOWBOY-BLUE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever {OnPlayer:you play|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] plays} a card, {OnPlayer:you gain|they gain} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Flow[/gold].
